message:
Command `STEP32="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting"

nohup /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad \
    -no_splash \
    -exit \
    -metrics "$STEP32/or_metrics_out.json" \
    /tmp/grt_finish_nocheck.tcl \
    > /tmp/grt_finish.log 2>&1 &

echo "OpenROAD PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/grt_finish.pid
sleep 45
ps -p $(cat /tmp/grt_finish.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
tail -15 /tmp/grt_finish.log` executed with exit code 0.
